Sales Saathi ingests structured and unstructured data, transforming it into actionable intelligence layered directly into your existing workflow.

AI Pre-Meeting Briefs

Walk into every deal fully prepared. Our engine automatically aggregates CRM history, recent news, 10-K filings, and LinkedIn activity into a scannable, high-density dossier generated minutes before your call.

Feature 01 · Pre-Meeting Briefs

Walk into every deal fully prepared.

What it does: Sales Saathi's AI Brief engine scans your CRM, news APIs, SEC filings, LinkedIn company pages, and Crunchbase funding data — then synthesizes it into a scannable, priority-ranked one-pager delivered straight to your browser exactly 15 minutes before your scheduled call.

How it works: When a calendar event is detected with an external participant, Sales Saathi cross-references all linked email domains against your CRM records, triggers a background intelligence sweep, and formats the output using a research-validated brief template — company overview, decision-maker profiles, open pain points from prior calls, and three custom talking points.

Why it matters: Top performers spend 5–7 hours per week on manual research. Sales Saathi eliminates this overhead entirely — freeing your team to focus exclusively on strategy, relationships, and revenue-generating activity.

  • Aggregates CRM history, LinkedIn, 10-Ks, and funding news in under 2 minutes
  • Auto-detected from Google Calendar and Outlook events
  • Three AI-generated contextual talking points per meeting
  • Available as browser extension overlay and mobile push notification
Start Using Briefs Free
70%
Reduction in pre-call prep time
Average across 2,000+ Sales Saathi users measured over 90 days
2 min
Brief generation time
vs. 45–90 min manual research

Feature 02 · Smart Ice-Breakers

Break the ice before the first word.

What it does: Analyzes public prospect data — their recent posts, company announcements, awards, shared connections, and industry news — to generate three uniquely personalized opening lines that make every cold outreach feel warm and researched.

How it works: The engine cross-references LinkedIn activity, Twitter/X posts, press releases, and role-change alerts against your configured ICP parameters. It generates hyper-specific sentence starters that reference a real, recent, and verifiable event — not a generic compliment.

Why it matters: Personalized ice-breakers increase reply rates by an average of 3.4× versus generic openers. In a world where buyers are flooded with outreach, this single capability can determine whether your email gets opened or archived.

  • Sources from LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Crunchbase, G2, and press releases
  • Adjustable tone: professional, conversational, or challenger
  • Bulk generation for entire prospect lists in under 60 seconds
  • A/B test variants tracked automatically in your sequences
Try Smart Ice-Breakers Free
Feature 03 · Live Meeting Coach

Your personal AI coach, in real time.

What it does: Listens to your calls via a lightweight browser extension, transcribes every word with 98% accuracy, and surfaces context-aware battlecards, objection handlers, and pricing justifications in a side panel — all in under 400 milliseconds of trigger detection.

How it works: The Live Coach integrates directly with Google Meet, Zoom, and MS Teams via our browser extension. The proprietary acoustic model streams audio in 500ms chunks, runs NLP sentiment analysis, matches detected phrases against your custom playbook triggers, and renders the appropriate battlecard immediately.

Why it matters: Even the best reps go blank under pressure. Sales Saathi's Live Coach is the equivalent of having your best closer whispering in your ear on every single call — converting objection moments into conversion moments.

  • Works on Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, and Webex
  • Custom playbook builder for your product, pricing, and competitors
  • Sub-400ms battlecard trigger latency for seamless experience
  • Sentiment score tracked in real-time with post-call mood analysis
Activate Live Coach Free
+31%
Win rate improvement on objection-heavy calls
Measured against control group of reps without Live Coach active

Transcription accuracy

vs. 20+ min manual logging
Feature 04 · AI Meeting Summaries

Zero notes. Perfect records. Every time.

What it does: Automatically transcribes, analyzes, and structures your post-meeting output into a formatted summary containing key decisions made, action items with owners and deadlines, prospect pain points, BANT qualifications captured, and objections raised — then pushes it directly to Salesforce, HubSpot, or your CRM of choice within three minutes of call end.

How it works: Call audio is processed via our hosted transcription pipeline, then analyzed by a domain-specific LLM fine-tuned on B2B sales conversations. The model extracts entities, commitments, and sentiment, mapping them to your CRM's custom schema automatically.

Why it matters: CRM data quality is the single biggest driver of accurate forecasting. AI Summaries eliminate manual entry errors, ensure 100% field coverage, and guarantee your pipeline data reflects reality — not approximations.

  • Pushes action items to Salesforce Tasks, HubSpot, Zoho, and Notion
  • Auto-detects BANT, MEDDIC, and SPIN selling framework milestones
  • Shareable summary email generated and sent to all participants automatically
  • Human-editable override panel before CRM push for review
Automate Your Post-Call Notes
Feature 05 · Follow-Up Automation

The follow-up email writes itself.

What it does: While you're still in the meeting, Sales Saathi is already composing a hyper-relevant follow-up email referencing the specific topics discussed, next steps committed to, resources to share, and a clear call-to-action — ready for your one-click approval and send.

How it works: The AI references the live meeting transcript in real-time, identifies committed next steps and deliverables, then applies your company's email tone guidelines and persona settings to generate a professionally written follow-up that sounds like you — not a bot.

Why it matters: Speed-to-follow-up is one of the highest-leverage variables in sales. Companies that send follow-ups within one hour of a meeting close 7× more often than those that wait 24 hours. Sales Saathi makes sub-60-minute follow-ups effortless for every rep.

  • Draft ready before your call officially ends
  • References specific transcript moments, not generic bullet points
  • Attaches agreed-upon resources, decks, and case studies automatically
  • Scheduled send with optimal timing recommendations per contact timezone
Automate Follow-Ups Now
7×
Higher close rates from sub-60-min follow-ups
Industry data: speed-to-follow-up is the #1 driver of post-meeting conversion

Follow-up generated

Feature 06 · Outreach Generator

Cold outreach that converts, at scale.

What it does: Generates complete, personalized multi-channel outreach sequences — email, LinkedIn message, and cold call scripts — tuned to each prospect's specific role, industry pain points, company funding stage, and identified trigger events, in under 12 seconds per prospect.

How it works: Define your ICP, upload your prospect list, and select your use case (new logo, expansion, win-back). The AI analyzes each prospect's public digital footprint against your value proposition, then generates channel-appropriate copy with hyper-specific subject lines, openers, and CTAs calibrated to current intent signals.

Why it matters: The average SDR spends 3–4 hours per day writing personalized emails. Sales Saathi compresses that to minutes, enabling your team to execute highly personalized sequences at volumes that were previously impossible without sacrificing quality.

  • Email, LinkedIn message, and cold call script generated simultaneously
  • Native sync with Outreach.io, Salesloft, Apollo, and HubSpot Sequences
  • Trigger-based personalization: funding rounds, leadership hires, product launches
  • Bulk generation of 200+ personalized sequences simultaneously
Generate Your First Sequence
Feature 07 · Deal Risk Predictor

Catch stalling deals before they die.

What it does: Continuously scores every deal in your pipeline using 40+ proprietary health signals — including email response velocity, stakeholder engagement depth, competitive mention frequency, days-in-stage against historical benchmarks, and BANT completeness — then flags at-risk opportunities with specific intervention recommendations before it's too late.

How it works: A scoring model trained on over 500,000 historical deal outcomes maps current deal patterns against known loss signals. Risk alerts are generated in real-time and delivered via Slack, email, or dashboard notification, with a recommended action to re-engage the prospect.

Why it matters: 60% of lost deals show clear warning signals two weeks before loss — signals that reps typically don't notice. The Deal Risk Predictor acts as your always-on pipeline auditor, ensuring no deal silently dies due to neglect or missed engagement windows.

  • 40+ health signals scored per deal in real-time
  • Risk alerts delivered to Slack, email, and mobile push
  • Trained on 500,000+ historical deal outcomes for accuracy
  • Specific next-step recommendation included in every risk alert
Protect Your Pipeline Now
60%
Of lost deals show detectable risk signals 2 weeks prior
Sales Saathi detects these early — before reps or managers notice

Health signals tracked
Per deal, per stage

Less pipeline leakage

Relationship coverage

Feature 08 · Relationship Intelligence

See every stakeholder. Influence every decision.

What it does: Maps the full stakeholder network within each target account — including hidden influencers, economic buyers, end users, and champions — along with their sentiment toward your deal, engagement history, and recommended next engagement action for each individual.

How it works: By analyzing email patterns, meeting participation history, LinkedIn organizational data, and CRM contact relationships, Sales Saathi constructs a live org chart with relationship strength scores, influence weightings, and sentiment indicators for each individual mapped to your deal.

Why it matters: Enterprise deals with 3+ engaged stakeholders close at 2.8× the rate of single-threaded opportunities. Relationship Intelligence ensures you're never blindsided by an unengaged economic buyer or a hidden detractor.

  • Visual org chart with influence scores per stakeholder
  • Identifies unengaged buyers with gap-filling action prompts
  • Shared champion identification via LinkedIn mutual connections
  • Alerts on role changes, departures, and new joiners in target accounts
Map Your Accounts Free
Feature 09 · Pipeline Analytics

Complete pipeline visibility, always.

What it does: Delivers real-time pipeline analytics dashboards that visualize conversion velocity, stage-by-stage drop-off rates, average deal cycle length by segment, rep performance benchmarks, and forecast accuracy — giving sales leaders a live, data-accurate view of the entire revenue engine.

How it works: Sales Saathi continuously syncs your CRM data and enriches it with AI-computed engagement metrics, activity signals, and competitive intelligence layers. All analytics are refreshed every 15 minutes, with historical trend comparison available across any custom date range.

Why it matters: Sales leaders who review real-time pipeline analytics weekly hit quota 19% more often than those relying on end-of-month CRM exports. Sales Saathi transforms reactive analysis into proactive revenue management.

  • Real-time funnel visualization with stage-by-stage conversion rates
  • Rep performance scorecards with activity and outcome benchmarks
  • Segment-level analysis by industry, company size, and deal source
  • Exportable board-ready reports generated in one click
View Live Demo Dashboard
+19%
Higher quota attainment with real-time pipeline reviews

Feature 10 · Revenue Intelligence

AI forecasting your CFO will actually trust.

What it does: Generates rolling 90-day revenue forecasts using pattern recognition across your entire deal portfolio, identifies which deals are mathematically likely to close versus optimistically included by reps, and surfaces prioritized next-best-action recommendations to maximize the current quarter's attainment.

How it works: Sales Saathi's revenue model is trained on your company's own historical win/loss data and enriched with market signals, rep activity patterns, and deal health scores. It produces a confidence-weighted forecast that separates committed revenue from pipeline optimism — automatically.

Why it matters: Accurate revenue forecasting isn't just a nice-to-have — it determines hiring plans, marketing budgets, and board confidence. Sales Saathi gives your organization a single source of truth that actually predicts what will happen, not what reps hope will happen.

  • Rolling 90-day revenue forecast refreshed weekly
  • "Commit" vs. "best case" vs. "pipeline" categorization powered by AI
  • Next-best-action recommendations surfaced per deal to close quarter
  • Board-ready forecast export with scenario modeling (base, bull, bear)
See the Revenue Dashboard

Plugs into your existing stack.

Sales Saathi integrates natively with the tools your team already uses — no migration, no disruption, no new logins to juggle.

Salesforce Full CRM sync, custom objects, and workflow triggers Native
HubSpot Bidirectional pipeline and contact data synchronization Native
Zoho CRM Full module sync including deals, contacts, and tasks REST API
Google Calendar Auto-detects meetings, attendees, and brief triggers Native
Outlook Calendar, email threading, and meeting detection Native
Slack Deal alerts, risk notifications, and brief delivery Native
LinkedIn Prospect enrichment, activity signals, and connection mapping Extension
Zoom & Meet Live transcription, coaching overlays, and recording analysis Native

Why Sales Saathi wins.

A production-grade comparison of traditional sales processes versus the Sales Saathi optimization framework.

Capability
Traditional Process
Sales Saathi
Pre-meeting research 45–90 min manual browsing per meeting 2-minute auto-generated AI Brief
Objection handling on calls Rely on memory, stumble under pressure Live battlecards triggered in <400ms
Post-call CRM updates 15–25 min manual data entry per call Automatic in 3 minutes, zero input
Follow-up email drafting Written hours or days after the call Draft ready before call ends, 1-click send
Cold outreach personalization Generic templates or 3–5 min per email 200+ personalized sequences in 60 sec
Deal health monitoring Weekly pipeline reviews, too late to act Real-time risk alerts, 2 weeks early
Revenue forecasting Rep gut-feel with ±30% accuracy AI-powered within ±5% accuracy
Multi-stakeholder mapping Single-threaded, hidden buyers missed Full org graph with influence scores
CRM data quality Incomplete, stale, rep-dependent 100% auto-filled, always current
Time spent on admin work 14+ hrs/week per rep Under 2 hrs/week per rep
